name: Democratic Straw Poll
subject: Biden surges, Buttigieg and Klobuchar drop out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
**Team, you 've been randomly selected from a group of top Democrats to take our pre-Super Tuesday straw poll.** With the field narrowing dramatically after the South Carolina primary this weekend, we need to know where grassroots Democrats stand. This is your last chance to voice your opinion before one-third of Democratic primary delegates are up for grabs tomorrow.
We're 67 responses short of reaching statistical significance in FL, and we're still missing your response. Tell us before this poll closes at midnight:
**Who 's your pick to be the Democratic nominee?**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The Trump attack machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
This is important, folks -- The last time Donald Trump was in Colorado, he fired up his right-wing base and raked in hundreds of thousands of dollars (just a picture with him cost $25,000?!) to boost up our opponent. **Now, he 's in North Carolina trying to do the same thing by campaigning against my friend, Democrat Cal Cunningham.** So before going any further, I have to ask: **Can you rush a split contribution of $10 or more before Trump gets to North Carolina to help Cal 's team prepare for the incoming Trump attack machine? We can't let Trump give Republicans a surge in momentum, not at such a critical moment like this.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200302-cal?refcode=em-200302-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---
Both Cal and I have really good shots at flipping these Senate seats blue. **A new poll released yesterday shows Cal a whole five points ahead of his Republican opponent.**
That's why Washington Republicans like Trump keep coming back to our states (in fact, Trump is visiting North Carolina for the FOURTH time today) hoping to tilt the balance of these competitive races.
And it's also why Mitch McConnell's super PAC and billionaire friends are **spending millions of dollars trying to buy these Senate seats and keep their grip on the majority.**
We can't let them get away with it, folks. That's why I'm turning to you during this incredibly important moment:
**Can you split a donation of whatever you can afford between mine and Cal 's campaigns for U.S. Senate? Together, we can flip our seats blue and take back the majority for Democrats. But first, we have to help Cal fight back against Trump tonight.**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200302-ty?refcode=em200302-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") I'm not asking today, friend, just thanking.

Thank you for all you have done and continue to do for our re-election campaign. I wouldn't be in this fight if it wasn't for folks like you chipping in whatever you can afford, volunteering your time, and taking action when it's needed most.

With your support, we reached our February fundraising goal. Now, we're in a stronger position than ever to meet all the challenges that lie before us.

And trust me, there are a lot of challenges ahead. Donald Trump and his GOP allies have seen the campaign we're building and are more determined than ever to try to turn Minnesota red. Trump's campaign manager even told Republican Senators (behind closed doors!) that Minnesota is one of their top targets.

They know Democrats can only retake the Senate if we hold strong in Minnesota, so they will be dumping resources into our state over the coming months.

**But you're doing your part to stop them in their tracks each time you give in response to one of these messages from me or my team. Your contributions -- no matter how small or large -- power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me.**

I'll be in touch about how you can continue to support our campaign, but for now: Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything you have already done. Your generosity means the world to me.

Knowing I have you alongside me every step of the way gives me great comfort.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200302-ty?refcode=em200302-ty&amount=10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). name: MJ Hegar
subject: One more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're counting down the hours until polls open for Primary Day.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902c3/7f51f7bc/4d9f00d9/4ef19cc0/2427705952/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

We're counting down the hours until polls open for Primary Day. Tomorrow Texans will decide who they want to be on the ballot in November -- and while our campaign has the momentum now, we've still got work to do. We have one last goal before Primary Day, and **[I'm asking for your help to hit it.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902c3/7f51f7bc/4d9f00d9/4ef19cc7/2427705952/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-pre-primary-goal?refcode=email_20200302.4nd__999__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

It's crucial that we nominate someone who can actually beat Sen. Cornyn in November. In my eyes, **that 's a combat veteran and working mom** who's faced the same challenges Texas families deal with every day. It's **a powerful grassroots movement that can stand up to Sen. Cornyn 's massive special interest-financed operation.** In my eyes, **that 's us.**

So if we want to send a signal to everyone that we are the campaign best prepared to take on Sen. Cornyn, we've got to hit every single goal. **With just hours left until Primary Day, now is a great time for your first donation.* Let's get out there and do this together.**

We're almost through this primary, Peter -- let's come out of it swinging hard.

\-- MJ

| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2zr/EBp9iB0vTo2evJSoeWafKw/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718bGoPwWWSr2HWPZhhuNGjiYcsLBJCOBZF3I7IGLkYJBbPvHER-2Fb4ITpUXP0vIIZ4ekhixI4Tx6pQfA8th5Z34lvZ-2BW-2FSvLWawC2Hv-2BiD2xx0SmpXSCQCDpNdme5EETt1VM9NAZ1pNSr3LMuFPiHGtBg-3D-3D/uWut)

Hi Friend, When I was a little girl, my mom and I were getting by on food stamps and holidays were a stretch for our budget, so for Halloween she made me a yellow taxi cab costume out of a cardboard box. As I went door to door for trick or treat, I was proud to display a bright red "Bernie for Burlington" bumper sticker on my box/car. Because even as a little kid, I knew that Bernie Sanders was fighting for me. I never dreamed that someday I'd be running for Congress, and Bernie would be running for President. On the eve of Super Tuesday 2020, Bernie has the most money, the most donors, and the most people power to defeat Donald Trump. Today I am officially endorsing Bernie Sanders. I pledge to do all I can to ensure that he is the nominee and the next President, and to win my race for Congress to back him up on Capitol Hill. [**Chip in today to make a 50/50 split donation to help Bernie win the nomination and to help us win in Oregon!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2zr/EBp9iB0vTo2evJSoeWafKw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKS5gzjGZO86GzbHtLD1x9sWQLusCneK-2BLvMjs52YOqBORDwqRztdRrpvsP3czzGRNpqv0fvqddQuZ8N-2BOsW03l4hwN4ZH7ecsVZ1kOYFiZOSRD3T46sEoreL-2B1anUZRw5Nwph1KiUMsH-2FXKQoWRdC-2FtYqbq9H-2FkEPOBK-2FNtIUVLrScszGj60EDG-2BvN4VsH86-2F-2BJdM4jEqCafZXhw5iicvOMx5MfbVZNlVZ7XBLZbBeyhppYckNZsJbiH5FNn2CCQ8-3D/uHZ9)

In 2020 it is time to take a stand so that everyone has a safe place to call home, access to healthcare, debt-free education, clean water, clean air, and a livable planet. Today I was proud to rally with UO Students for Bernie, the Sunrise Movement in Eugene, the Graduate Teaching Fellows Federation, and others to support Bernie Sanders for President. Our coalition is strong, and we will campaign hard for Oregon's 4th Congressional seat and for the Whitehouse. I stand with Senator Sanders because I believe he is our shot to remove Trump, and to win the changes our community so urgently needs. He has fought for poor and working class people since I was six years old, and I trust Bernie to keep fighting for us. Together, we can make history in electing #46, President Sanders! In solidarity, Doyle Canning
---

name: Bloomberg 2020 Digital Team
subject: 5 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
The most important thing you can do right now is online

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=45febbf5bb7b4ff29b4c1fd00d4dcb15&_e=HlV_HfoNAS6FOAuCkwELMYiu3dN7wdhLlVAjweVHlHFeCX88edw6xM6wYsk46Py7GwVTQCpjM_zpEEAlJ95Xlm0ePjiOnF6cBlaXTgsOiQHCJC-Ohcd_3MYpnFs8Ntx4xRUBtM2T8xaXdoQ7GcYgYnYQS2_SLfKIAnh4a68IbldziiGwZP1HaNJt7-vNLhnOhMDPCJpOn5Rkn61bYlb3phEXCtdm-_xASte19nLCPYCjhZV8gQuXmjfhRzA0ZkcAlr-bfa6Q9nAuS-3f8ZFKsFUwSrT8IRvzKsH91Rumq5nQXHN1IF4DyL67UDjNezNlOfSp85KpZ5n1G2q-FGIzklRJyzs_7HCacm7_6coP4SjMf3FjiTd4ijLHuW685Nx3Pew5Q9G6_XMLHKEAlJmSjQ%3D%3D) Friend -- Hello from Mike Bloomberg's digital team -- we're the ones who are getting the word out about Mike in what has increasingly become Americans' #1 source of information: their social media networks. As we head into Super Tuesday, it's critically important that our supporters keep knocking doors, making calls, and texting to get out the vote for Mike ([**you can find events here**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=45febbf5bb7b4ff29b4c1fd00d4dcb15&_e=HlV_HfoNAS6FOAuCkwELMf_Jgl_gGki-szgbl3sH7UtHbqVatudOZMzTTR1WPVFCuhfnQW5TEKcddRvz_yuYNlXs0V1IWDxpTrY2FkxTQvzX9R0ju2DlKvkQYOAATrzyKyk8-TYsrAC5gHjihtK1Pk0GjgCFe6SMnUo2hgOMbEuH4ZBh7abBeadRvbF0gUocb7BlrkZxG_shSjdb7TUHxTtk0K4teSnbK500_XwX2hMPOEgPXVY5PBGMhTNus2E59A3-xXYs5YkuqxbCkK3EGK8fGJHG-xBicF_0GX0rQIyJyUDBC4p_xCIKgCr30a_Bzh9Dkc_rX0mduf8Ne-xPBZ1_iPW5JpSRkebJnD6bGp21Vf0H39FAULbMUYi1drfx)), but there are some quick actions you can take online that actually make a huge impact. Can you take a second to share our latest piece about Mike's record? A lot of folks are still wondering who they should vote for and trying to make an informed decision. [**So we're making it simple. Here are five reasons to vote for Mike. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Our future demands it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friend, Election Day is tomorrow and I want to take a moment to remind you why I'm running for Congress.

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791c/27c6da69/2b3c8de7/12f09c7/3281100100/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791c/27c6da69/2b3c8de7/12f09c8/3281100100/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200302-1-EM&amount=1")
---
Friend,

Election Day is tomorrow and I want to take a moment to remind you why I'm running for Congress.

I believe we don't have to settle for the way things have always been done. Our children and families can't wait for a dysfunctional Washington to start paying attention. I believe it's more important than ever to have representatives who are willing to listen to each other, respect one another, and actually get something done.

**We must act boldly to address climate change, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, fight for housing that 's affordable for everyone and health care as a human right, increase access to affordable childcare, and defend access to reproductive care.**

I went to public schools here in San Diego. And growing up here, I know that I've had opportunities that many others haven't. **I believe it is my responsibility to make our system fairer, which is why I 've dedicated my life to public service and to ensuring that everyone has access to the opportunities that they deserve, regardless of where they live, what they look like, or who they love.**

I want to serve the people of San Diego in Congress because I love my home.

Thank you for being on this journey with me. Together, we can build the future we deserve.

-Sara
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791c/27c6da69/2b3c8de7/12f09c8/3281100100/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200302-1-EM&amount=1")
---

* * *
| | [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791c/27c6da69/2b3c8de7/12f09c9/3281100100/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")

---

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791c/27c6da69/2b3c8de7/12f09ca/3281100100/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: My vote in the primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I’m voting for Joe Biden because he can beat Donald Trump; because having
him at the top of the ticket will help our down-ballot candidates,
especially in Texas; and because he can bring people together to reach the
ambitious goals we have for our country.

Joe can beat Donald Trump because he is the clear contrast to Donald
Trump. Joe Biden is kind and decent. Empathetic and caring. He will
reassert our moral standing in the world at a moment that it’s been called
into question, and he will take a strong stand for democracy and the rule
of law at a moment that both are under attack at home and abroad. We have
never had a threat so existential to our democracy as the one we face in
Donald Trump. I believe that Joe Biden is our best hope to take on Trump
and Trumpism, and to restore the integrity of our elections and our
republic.

Joe can also help our candidates in state legislative races across the
country. We have a chance to win a majority in the Texas state house for
the first time in 20 years. That means no more racist gerrymandering, no
more voter suppression and no more bathroom bills and “show me your
papers” legislation. Many of our Democratic candidates and state
representatives have told me that having Biden at the top of the ticket is
going to help them win and stay in office.

And I believe that Joe can help us accomplish an ambitious agenda for
America. He has listened to the people of this country in developing
progressive plans on climate change, immigration, healthcare, gun
violence, and caring for our veterans. I am confident that he has the
experience and capacity to build the coalitions necessary to make progress
on these issues, and has shown an ability to reach across the aisle to
build consensus.

While I am declaring my support for Joe, I must acknowledge the strengths
of the remaining candidates. Elizabeth Warren has demonstrated
extraordinary integrity and intelligence in her career and on the campaign
trail. Michael Bloomberg has often used his wealth to pursue the common
good: reducing gun violence and averting climate catastrophe. And Bernie
Sanders has consistently and successfully pushed this country to think
big. From universal healthcare to higher education that is accessible to
everyone, he and his supporters have already made this a better country by
asking us to demand more of ourselves. I am encouraged by the energy of
his volunteers, especially the young people at the vanguard of his
movement. They are fighting for ideals that are consistent with our
highest aspirations, and I am confident that their leadership will be
essential to reaching them, whoever wins the next election.

Any of the remaining candidates would make a great President and would be
a welcome alternative to the current occupant of the White House. I am
grateful to those who have made the sacrifice to run and especially to
their supporters, team members and volunteers.

You’re receiving this email because you are a current or previous
supporter of mine, a friend or family member. I know from the feedback
I’ve received throughout this election cycle from you that some on this
list will be happy that I’m supporting Joe and some will be disappointed.
Please know that regardless of the candidate we back, I believe that we’re
ultimately all in this together, and I look forward to fighting by your
side now or down the road.

Whether our nominee is Joe Biden or someone else - I will support that
person with all that I have. Our country, our democracy, our future is on
the line and we should expect nothing less of ourselves.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=80767%2E444211%2E7UODDQ

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15660993/165523635/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTVhNjJmZS00ZTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ie3PsEgNsr9CiiCwG1OLQUvKxy2dgUipibBlilYp6-c=&emci=e35c3a8c-d05c-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=995a62fe-4e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

Well, here we are! 13 months after I quit my job last February. Even longer if you consider the last campaign. Many months of hard work, introducing myself to folks across this district, building a campaign infrastructure, and developing a broad coalition to take back the Texas 10th.

**Thank you. I truly mean it. From my wife Hindatu, from my children Malika and Hamza, from our family and community: thank you for making this possible. Thank you for making this worthwhile. I would not be doing this work, if not for you.**

This campaign is about building a foundation for lasting political change. For too long, our representatives have left the people behind. Allowing hospitals to close while opposing healthcare for all. Attacking unions and government workers while allowing the wealthiest to prosper. Using immigrant families and people of color as targets for political gain, instead of upholding our common humanity and dignity.

Together, we are changing our communities and we are changing Texas, for the better. We’ve built solidarity with Prairie View students and Fayette farmers and Austin activists. We’ve given voice to residents from Brenham and Sealy, Bastrop and Eagle Lake. We’ve made friends and won allies. We’ve cultivated hope and opportunity and more.

I hope you are enjoying the ride. And it’s not over yet! We feel tremendous optimism about what we’ve accomplished, about what the voters are telling us at their doors, about what the people want here in the Texas 10th. And we are committed to seeing this through: all the way to November, and to Washington, DC, and beyond.

**Thank you. You are appreciated more than you know.**

With love and solidarity,
Mike Siegel

name: Dr. Manny
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 3/2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday!

Last week, I was traveling around Tennessee and got to talk to with people all across the state about the issues on their mind during this election. Many people have been telling me that the high cost of healthcare and the opioid crisis are the top problems we need to solve. As a doctor, I have seen firsthand how Obamacare and the opioid crisis has negatively affected Tennessee. I oppose government in our healthcare, I oppose single-payer health-insurance, and I oppose universal healthcare. Period. We need less government involvement in our healthcare, not more. The fundamentals of a health care system must be based on a free market solution that allows competition across state lines. We must focus on access, quality, and transparency. This week I will be back out on the campaign trail, criss crossing the state and talking to Tennessee voters. I believe Tennesseans want someone in office that will fight for their values. As the conservative outsider, I am fighting the establishment and running to be your next U.S. Senator Additionally, as the coronavirus COVID-19 continues to spread across the globe, I released an eight-point plan to address this dangerous disease. Last week, President Trump announced an emergency funding request to address the coronavirus epidemic. I urge Congress to act quickly on this matter. As a doctor, I know firsthand how serious this could be. [Read my eight point plan here to learn how we will stop this global outbreak!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-y/) **News:** I had the opportunity to sit down with the _Covington Leader_ the other week in Tipton County. I appreciate them writing such a great piece about my Senate race and why I want to do this. This race is going to be decided by Tennesseans, not the DC establishment! [Read the article here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-j/) **Social Media:** Maya and I had a fantastic time at the Wilson County Trump Day Dinner last week! We had a packed house for a great night of discussion about the future of our party and the importance of electing strong conservatives. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-t/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-i/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-d/)! Also be sure to tag us on social media for your chance to be featured in our next Check-Up with Dr. Manny. We are just under six months until the primary election on August 6th. I can't do this without your support. Together we can make a different kind of difference! Dr. Manny P.S. [W](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-h/)[o](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-k/)[uld you consider chipping in? We can't do this without you, and every donation helps! ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-u/) [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhiypjl-olhhkyhhid-o/) |

As a doctor, I have seen firsthand how Obamacare and the opioid crisis has negatively affected Tennessee. I oppose government in our healthcare, I oppose single-payer health-insurance, and I oppose universal healthcare. Period. We need less government involvement in our healthcare, not more. The fundamentals of a health care system must be based on a free market solution that allows competition across state lines. We must focus on access, quality, and transparency. This week I will be back out on the campaign trail, criss crossing the state and talking to Tennessee voters. I believe Tennesseans want someone in office that will fight for their values. As the conservative outsider, I am fighting the establishment and running to be your next U.S. Senator Additionally, as the coronavirus COVID-19 continues to spread across the globe, I released an eight-point plan to address this dangerous disease. Last week, President Trump announced an emergency funding request to address the coronavirus epidemic. I urge Congress to act quickly on this matter. As a doctor, I know firsthand how serious this could be. News: I had the opportunity to sit down with the Covington Leader the other week in Tipton County. I appreciate them writing such a great piece about my Senate race and why I want to do this. This race is going to be decided by Tennesseans, not the DC establishment! Social Media: Maya and I had a fantastic time at the Wilson County Trump Day Dinner last week! We had a packed house for a great night of discussion about the future of our party and the importance of electing strong conservatives. Follow us on , , and ! Also be sure to tag us on social media for your chance to be featured in our next Check-Up with Dr. Manny. We are just under six months until the primary election on August 6th. I can't do this without your support. Together we can make a different kind of difference! Dr. Manny P.S. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

**This is it -- The most important election of our lifetimes is TODAY.**
Today, Texas voters have a chance to vote in the presidential primary election, as well as local and state races, including my own race for re-election to the US House.
[**If you 're a Texas voter, you can find all the information you need here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VenGqubk_JJ48XHSmOYgSHT9rpTppeWVq5jVdPCMNc8=/34q-cyOl-yL-ePKo_KK8xMtxFEtmC2sG1ImGzg8BoXI=)
But whether you're voting today or have already voted, this movement includes you -- because it's going to take each and every one of us pitching in to take our country back, heal from the abuses of the current administration, and move forward to a better future.
**This is our movement -- ALL of us. So for the last time before polls close, will you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can spare to invest in this grassroots movement for a better future?**
**Here 's a special Election Day link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/AGTX-09-Email-March2020-FR-no?refcode=ElectionDay](https://act.myngp.com/el/VenGqubk_JJ48XHSmOYgSHT9rpTppeWVq5jVdPCMNc8=/Ds6VCEnTVCyACc5FN6BaJ1824LR4oIhdNXGZXuwf_OM=?refcode=E1586-20200303-Today-SL&amount=25)**
Thank you, team. I appreciate your support more than you know. And I want you to know that I remain committed to standing up to injustice and speaking up for those whose voices go unheard.
Thank you,
Congressman Al Green

name: Bill Weld
subject: Rise and Shine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
Team — In just a few hours, voters across the country are going to cast their vote in the Republican Primary and we feel like we are in a strong position to carry this campaign through to the nomination. We outperformed expectations at every turn in this race. In Iowa we exceed expectations at the caucuses. In New Hampshire, we got a higher percentage of Republican primary voters than Joe Biden got Democratic ones.**_And now, on Super Tuesday, we’re going to show them we’re not going anywhere._** But here’s the truth: if we’re going to keep going, we need to know you’ve got our back in the weeks and months ahead. This election has never been a sprint — it’s a marathon and we wouldn’t be here right now without you. And for that, I am forever grateful. [**So if you can, can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to our campaign right now to help us raise the funds we need to keep on marching towards the nomination?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200303_frs&n=1) | | [CHIP IN →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200303_frs&n=2)

subject: GAME DAY

body:
I need your help to DEFEAT THE SWAMP! Read more >>
Peter, We’re finally here. It’s GAME DAY!

The polls opened at 7:00 a.m. this morning. Suzanne and I just got out to cast our ballots.

I'm writing to ask you to make YOUR plan to vote before 7:00 p.m. tonight, and urge your family and friends to get out to vote for Tommy Tuberville for U.S. Senate as well.

_**We need every vote we can muster to DEFEAT THE SWAMP today!** _

[**If you’re not sure where to vote, you can find your polling location here**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3bd7fb629cb07bba/b591fe52bf52914ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Let’s WIN this!

| | **Democrats are in complete disarray.**

Buttigieg and Klobuchar just dropped out to try to save Biden. Bloomberg is on track to spend a billion dollars to try to buy the nomination. And none of it matters because later today Bernie Sanders is still going to win the most Super Tuesday states.

Meanwhile our entire party is unified and focused on winning in November. President Trump has an unprecedented approval rating in the party, and last week I officially received the full endorsement of our local Republican Party just weeks after being put on the national committee’s top contender list.

We’re ramping up while they are melting down - and I’m not taking my foot off the gas.

name: Chris Regan
subject: Moving West Virginia Forward
body:
www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate]
The past several years have been trying for the reputation of our West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals. Our Court was in the news, night after night, and day after day, for all the wrong reasons. Change was sorely needed. Fortunately, Justice John Hutchison has been a bright light, restoring integrity and honor to our state's highest Court.
Justice Hutchison brought to the bench immense legal knowledge and twenty-three years of experience in the trenches as a circuit court judge. He has distinguished himself as a jurist by running one of the most productive circuit courts in West Virginia, averaging nearly 1,000 closed cases in each of his years on the bench. He has an unblemished record of service that makes West Virginians proud of their judicial system.
As an attorney, a Judge, and a Justice, John Hutchison has earned the respect of his colleagues throughout West Virginia. Lawyers know to be on their toes when they are before him because he calls it fair, right down the line, and makes sure our laws are strictly and carefully enforced. That’s the kind of steady, reliable leadership we desperately need on West Virginia’s Supreme Court of Appeals.
I hope you’ll consider joining me in making a donation to John’s campaign today. If elected, I know he’ll be a Justice who stands tall for West Virginia, delivering equal justice in the cases that come before him.
Chris Regan
Bordas & Bordas, PLLC
www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/justicejohnhutchison] Contact Info:Committee to Keep Justice Hutchison
PO Box 5176
Beckley, WV 25801
United States
Twitter [https://twitter.com/justicehutch]

https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]

name: Troy Newman
subject: I’ve been called the abortion industry’s “biggest foe"
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) Dear Fellow Pro-Life American, My name is Troy Newman. **As a founding member of the Center for Medical Progress, I helped show the world who Planned Parenthood really is -- a cabal of mass murderers who manipulate vulnerable women and then sell the dismembered bodies of their aborted children to the highest bidder.** Because of my work for the unborn, I landed in the liberal bastion of San Francisco last fall, where I fought in a courtroom for almost two months to defend my First Amendment rights. But sadly -- for me personally, for the pro-life movement, and for all who believe in free speech -- the California jury sided with the mass murderers at Planned Parenthood and saddled us with $870 thousand in damages -- with millions more in attorney's fees to come. **These damages could bankrupt the work I do every day as president of Operation Rescue, where I fight to protect unborn lives by shutting down abortion clinics and the murderous practitioners who operate them.** **[Will you please make a much-needed emergency gift of $10, $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help me shut down the abortion industry -- and especially Planned Parenthood -- one clinic at a time?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==)** [**Contribute $10**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) [**Contribute $25**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) [**Contribute $50**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) [**Contribute Other Amount**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) For my decades of work to put Planned Parenthood out of business, I've been called the abortion industry's "biggest foe." But our successes have come at a tremendous cost. I've spent years in legal battles defending my right to expose the abortion industry's illegal and barbarous activity. **I 've been subjected to death threats, arson attempts, had my car tampered with, had my bank accounts investigated, lost my insurance coverage, and more -- all because I dare to stand up to Planned Parenthood every single day.** I knew what I was getting into when I signed on for this fight, but I hoped and prayed that I wouldn't have to go through it alone... which is why I'm reaching out to you, my friend. While I appeal my lawsuit against Planned Parenthood, I need the support of every American who values life to continuing fighting this David vs. Goliath battle. **[I hope I can count on your support to stand up to Planned Parenthood.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==)** Here at Operation Rescue, we work every day to SHUT the abortion industry down, one abortion clinic at a time. **We don 't wait for Congress to act. We don't wait for hearts or minds to change. We don't wait for science to come around to what we know to be true about the value of unborn life.** We take aim right at the source of the problem -- the abortion clinics and those who run them -- and we work to put them out of business one at a time. The result? Last year, thanks in large part to our work, 36 abortion clinics closed in 2019 alone, and 367 have closed their doors since 2013. Untold thousands of lives have been saved as a result. If you believe that killing unborn children is immoral... If you believe that Planned Parenthood should NOT receive a dime of taxpayer dollars... If you believe that life is a gift from our Heavenly Father to be celebrated, not brutally and prematurely ended... **[Please help us continue our tireless work with your immediate gift of $10.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==)** To help me stand up for the 61 million babies murdered at the hands of abortionists since the horrific passage of Roe v. Wade, I pray you'll help with your gift today. As you and I both know, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They're passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they're ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. **My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and SHUTTING THEM DOWN, but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace, we must increase our efforts in 2020 as well.** **[To fight back for life and ensure we win the war against Planned Parenthood, please help with your gift of $10 or more right away.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==)** [**Contribute**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ui5W6h7OgxvsI4vY-lRbD1BcEoywtaZA2-PtPSejRHlxXaAAQXSPQDe4bMH2_vJppgsYynWaMO869LGe7P1dS8do0DGQyuvOChWveodBRZkVftMXNRBnkiD73BZsQWhXFhHih4AflAR7Zxbo4w9de8wz2LeLX8tMwyJv_UKslsyssxSDf5noi2_vrYPcvcFCwLuumGBRJo1bh3doN_EufGclETsipBM5&c=6EZShRFBBbYyW9ZrrBPYR0-kAeerdyD4hW4ZaEXi_l7UbHbq1iKpxw==&ch=gIZERY34y6gk0yBEpCnSv27GWRivhREPhbyvylLfi7qyJsajnxFM8w==) Thank you for your support! God bless you, -- Troy P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Update and Specifics on Primary Voting in Wake of Middle Tennessee Tornado Tragedy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Last night was devastating for our Middle Tennessee communities, and the devastation will continue for hours and days to come. Our hearts and thoughts are with all those affected, responders as they survey the damage, and the entire community.
Many communities in Middle Tennessee have had polling location damage. Polls opened at 8AM and will stay open until 7PM. Some voters will need to change polling locations in Putnam, Davidson, and Wilson Counties. Please find voting locations changes below.
Davidson County Changes
Voters impacted by the tornado who normally vote at the following locations may vote at Donelson Presbyterian Church:

Haynes Middle School will vote at Whites Creek Fire Station 25.
Looby Community Center will vote at Northwest YMCA.
Lead Brick Church Middle School will vote at Bellshire Elementary.
Davidson County voters who need a ride to the polls can contact DCDP by calling 616-479-8320.
Putnam County Changes
Putnam County voters in the following precinct polling locations will vote at the County Election Commission at 705 County Services Drive, Cookeville, TN 38501:

West Wilson Middle School and Lebanon High Schools have closed, but, voters can vote in any other polling locations throughout the county.
If you have any trouble voting, contact our voter protection hotline.

name: Team Kaine
subject: Derek, it's time to go vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Polls are officially OPEN across Virginia, and now is the time to go make your voice heard in this critical election!
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1704/3e0906/78da552d/3e30c427/1817880061/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday&source=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

Polls are officially OPEN across Virginia, and now is the time to go make your voice heard in this critical election!

[**Click here to double check your polling location**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1704/3e0906/78da552d/3e30c426/1817880061/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=VA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+double+check+your+polling+&utm_campaign=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday&source=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday")**, and then make your plan for when you'll swing by and vote. Polls are open from 6:00 AM until 7:00 PM, and as long as you're in line by 7 PM, you will be able to cast your ballot.**

If you voted early (like Tim did on Saturday for Joe Biden!), you can still make a huge impact by forwarding this email to your friends and family to get the word out and encourage them to vote.

Virginia has an important role to play today, and every single vote cast can make a difference in deciding our Democratic nominee.

Thanks for being a voter!

-Team Kaine

| [**FIND MY POLLING PLACE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1704/3e0906/78da552d/3e30c425/1817880061/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=VA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+FIND+MY+POLLING+PLACE&utm_campaign=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday&source=20200303_GOTV_TEAM_SuperTuesday")

subject: It's Election Day. I am humbly asking for your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
But first, I’d like to start by saying thank you. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672515/165623009/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
Good morning, friend.

It's Election Day. Before I hit the doors, I wanted to take a moment and give you one last update from the campaign trail.

_**But first, I’d like to start by saying thank you.**_

It means the world to me to have your confidence, and I’m proud to say that this campaign has been a community-led effort from the very start. Thanks to you, we are heading into the day with momentum, and our campaign to enact meaningful, progressive change for our communities and our working families is stronger than ever.

I’m also so proud that we’ve been able to build an incredibly broad coalition behind our campaign. Our endorsements include: **\- The California Democratic Party (We’re the only official nominee)
\- The California Federation of Teachers
\- The California Labor Federation
\- The California Nurses Association** We’ve picked up support from national progressive figures: **\- Senator Bernie Sanders
\- Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
\- Rep. Pramilla Jayyapal
\- Rep. Ro Khanna** We also have support from local elected leaders: **\- State Senator Toni Atkins
\- Assemblymember Shirley Weber
\- Assemblymember Todd Gloria
\- Assemblymember Lorena Gonzalez
\- County Supervisor Nathan Fletcher
\- National City Mayor Alejandra Sotelo-Solis
\- Councilmember Barbara Bry
\- Councilmember Monica Montgomery... and many more** **[To view our full list of endorsers, click here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672516/165623010/-2115909708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

We’re two days from Election Day, and there are still ways you can help our campaign: **1\. Volunteer and help us turn out voters.** We are calling voters and knocking doors around the clock until polls close. This is probably the most impactful action you can take to make sure we emerge victorious. **[Join us here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672517/165623011/773839218?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

**2\. Vote!** Make sure that you, and everybody you know, submits their ballots as soon as possible or gets to the polls before they close tonight at 8:00pm (Tuesday March 3rd). For information on voting, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672518/165623012/-944096871?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

**3\. Spread the word.** Forward this email to five or more friends and family that live in the area. Explain why you are supporting my campaign, and direct them to **[my website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672519/165623013/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)** for more information about my policies and experience.

**4\. Share your story.** Spread the word about our campaign on **[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672520/165623014/-68037600?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgeorgettegomez.org%2Fmeet-georgette%2F%0A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)** and **[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672521/165623015/343342365?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgeorgettegomez.org%2F&original_referer=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fshare%3Furl%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fgeorgettegomez.org%252F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&emci=9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)** , and be sure to tell your story about why you are supporting our campaign. I’m ready to deliver for this community -- on universal health care, ending the climate crisis, housing, comprehensive immigration reform, and so much more. But I cannot do this alone. Taking our locally-grown, progressive vision to Washington is going to require this whole community coming together.

Thank you for your vote today, and for helping us make history in our San Diego community.

_Georgette_ **[Donate ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-03032020-all-a)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15672522/165623016/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9358ef8d-6e5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/0386647e-715d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzg2NjQ3ZS03MTVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUV1vpPm-jlYGQZn34dgStbOfE1bHDrTnHaNVoAS9Hk=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
Georgette Gómez for Congress

| Peter,
You're probably about to head out to lunch, but [don't forget that today is Election Day and the LAST day to vote in our Primary Election!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zJICTuz65BsvA_kGZUKk6o-TkKEGwpKL8-nmCD6ur4fgSy8cASDLl7-M2Pur_81NlWGEZX7jEsTyRKIYaJqtvBwzqUesDbHrhQCzOGFxNvm5UiA-LS5vgOjXBpa6qc_VYqMtWTKGVQlfiYKCM-vHcI7zAMheQtU9&c=yjD_fuyJtq9zlqDmRXtym2rRIWLzGEAm1iGB1_XCxVcEk9s-Dv_yxg==&ch=2btoX7ZbhlMQkWeq51JkwHUWJrMi6GI6_zD5qffeKVY5M97T-r5S-Q==)
[Help us elect a 100% Texan conservative to face off with Democrat Collin Allred this fall.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zJICTuz65BsvA_kGZUKk6o-TkKEGwpKL8-nmCD6ur4fgSy8cASDLl7-M2Pur_81NlWGEZX7jEsTyRKIYaJqtvBwzqUesDbHrhQCzOGFxNvm5UiA-LS5vgOjXBpa6qc_VYqMtWTKGVQlfiYKCM-vHcI7zAMheQtU9&c=yjD_fuyJtq9zlqDmRXtym2rRIWLzGEAm1iGB1_XCxVcEk9s-Dv_yxg==&ch=2btoX7ZbhlMQkWeq51JkwHUWJrMi6GI6_zD5qffeKVY5M97T-r5S-Q==) It's clear that our campaign is the grassroots choice, but when it all comes down to it, we've got to put our votes where our voices are!
Team Genevieve and I will be at voting polls all day and we hope to see you there! Let's do this,

---
| |
---
| | Friends,

This is it. 12 hours from now we will know if we made it across the finish line. From now until then we are firing on all cylinders; if you have not voted yet, please make it to the polls**!

Every single vote counts in this race!** You can find your [voting location on my website. ](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=2d2f29de57&e=52e38a8253)

If you have already voted, then forward this email to all of your friends and family in the district and **get them out to vote!**

We need a problem solver in DC. I am that problem solver.

Thank you for your support,

George

name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Fwd: News release from Jim Oberweis
body:
*Jim Oberweis new ad responds to Democrat’s radical immigration policies*

*Oberweis warned about current immigration crisis*

*Mar. 3, 2020*

*For Immediate
Release
*

*Contact: Travis Akin*

*618-303-1108 *

Sugar Grove, IL – Jim Oberweis has been consistent in speaking out about
illegal immigration and the effects these failed Democrat policies have on
American citizens, from a public safety crisis, to loss of jobs, to funding
free healthcare for illegal aliens. In a newly launched ad, Jim Oberweis
demonstrates his consistent support for immigration reform to ensure
American citizens are always put first.

The ad comes in the wake of news about Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker’s radical
immigration policies. Currently, the Illinois Department of Corrections is
ignoring ICE requests to transfer illegal immigrants who are due for
release to the Jerome Combs Detention Center in Kankakee, resulting in the
release of potentially hundreds of convicted violent felons back into
communities across the state.

“Just like Lauren Underwood and Nancy Pelosi, the Governor is embracing the
radical left and that is putting every community in the 14th District at
risk,” Oberweis said. “I warned a long time ago what radical policies like
this would do to our communities. Sadly, this has become the reality here
in 2020. The Democrats are releasing illegal immigrants who are violent
felons and promising to use American tax dollars to give illegal Aliens
free healthcare, it is truly unbelievable.”

Brian McCann lives in the 14th Congressional District. In 2011, his brother
Dennis was in Logan Square on Chicago’s North Side. He was an insurance
broker and was there to meet a client about 6 o’clock in the evening. As he
was crossing Kenzie Ave., Dennis was hit by a drunk driver, who was an
illegal alien with a history of criminal offenses. Saul Chavez was
inebriated three times the legal limit. Brian’s brother was struck by the
car and dragged for an entire city block and died a violent death.

“There is no question that my brother would still be alive if we had
common-sense policies here in Illinois,” McCann said. “My brother’s death
was a violent and senseless tragedy that could have been prevented. What is
happening with these sanctuary state and sanctuary city policies is wrong
and our communities are at risk. I am glad Jim Oberweis is taking a stand.
It is time we put the safety of our communities first.”

View Oberweis’ ad by clicking on the link: https://youtu.be/i-My1bni5kU.

To learn more about Jim Oberweis, log onto https://jim2020.com/.

###

<https://www.avast.com/sig-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=link&utm_campaign=sig-email&utm_content=webmail&utm_term=icon>
Virus-free.
www.avast.com
<https://www.avast.com/sig-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=link&utm_campaign=sig-email&utm_content=webmail&utm_term=link>

subject: Did you see my wife’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dac3ab20762b/did-you-see-my-wifes-email?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi there,

My wife, Kathaleen Wall, is one amazing woman. For years she has served Republicans across Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris Counties, across our great state, and across our great nation. I’m constantly in awe of her passion for conservative values and her ability to work tirelessly to preserve those values in America.

She emailed you yesterday about the Primary Election Day today. I wanted to make sure you saw it.

The polls are open until 7:00 pm. **If you haven’t voted for her, would you?** If you have friends that live in CD-22, would you tell them about what a great candidate she is and **ask them to go vote for her?**

**We simply must send her to Washington D.C. so we can defeat the socialist Democrats and help President Trump TAKE THE HOUSE BACK.**

Hopefully you are able to attend Kathaleen's [**Election Night Watch Party tonight at Pacific Coast Tacos in Sugar Land!**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=1ae6f2efa5&e=01c99b7fbd)

Best,
---
|
---
| Holloway (Holly) Frost
---
|
---
| Hi friend,

You and I have an opportunity to save our country. We have the chance to stand with our nation’s most accomplished President, Donald Trump. We have the ability to reclaim the conservative values under attack in our country.

**You and I get to MAKE HISTORY with our VOTE.**

While the progressive Democrats continue to shamelessly push socialism (which you and I both know _**destroys countries**_), we will go to the polls. Never before has the liberal left so blatantly gone this far off the deep-end. **This election is HISTORIC.**

During this Republican Primary tomorrow, I need you to vote for me to be your next Congressman in Congressional District 22.

**We cannot defeat the Democrats in November without you voting for me tomorrow.**

If you’ve already voted for me, **thank you!**

If you voted early or are voting tomorrow, **would you forward this email to your friends and family in CD-22** (which encompasses parts of Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris Counties)?

Just click forward and encourage them to vote for me! By doing so, this historic year can be remembered by our grandchildren as a year of prosperity instead of the beginning of the downfall of America.

---
| [Yes! I will tell my friends to vote for you Kathaleen!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=25a1ae22eb&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I will tell my friends to vote for you Kathaleen!")
---
| With you sending me to Congress to help President Trump pass his entire agenda, 2020 will be a year for the record books of how you and I Kept America Great.

For God and country, Kathaleen Wall

P.S. – will I see you at my [**Election Night Watch Party TOMORROW NIGHT at Pacific Coast Tacos?**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8b9a439047&e=01c99b7fbd)

In 77 days, voters will nominate the U.S. Senate candidate they think has the best shot at winning this seat, which will help retake the Senate majority and deliver Georgia’s 16 electoral votes for our Democratic presidential nominee. Georgia is a two-point, two-party state. We’re THE battleground in 2020. My number one priority right now is making sure we are taking this campaign’s winning message to every single Georgia voter before May 19th. I’m the only person in this race who has won elections — and I broke barriers while doing it. That experience is what we need to win a race against an incumbent with the deep-pocketed Republican establishment’s support. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Thank you, Teresa = = = PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

Friend, Election day is FINALLY here! **After months of traveling across Texas ' 12th district, we are on the verge of a historic victory.** Kay Granger and her team of DC lobbyists have seen the same information that we have and are terrified you will help us win today. Let's not leave anything to chance today and finish with no regrets. Reach out to your friends and neighbors, and take them to the polls with you! If you need any help finding your polling location, **visit[votetexas.gov](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/u9puyMexphejQs3CIgVXfA/ijeP9puYdGa2zubrdBOvKg) or contact my campaign team at [info@putnamfortexas.org.](mailto:info@putnamfortexas.org) ** **Today is the last day to beat Kay Granger, no IFs, ANDs, or BUTs. name: Team Moulton
subject: Joe Biden has what it takes to unite our country and move us forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, This presidential election is about two things: finding the candidate who can truly, actually beat Donald Trump in November _and_ picking the leader who can bring our country together once in office. That is our cause right now. That’s our mission. And our best bet to do that is Joe Biden. As so many presidential candidates have pointed out, there’s more work to do beyond beating Donald Trump. And, of course, they’re right. So we need to pick a candidate who can beat Trump and also carry the rest of our candidates down the ballot along, helping our House and Senate candidates running in tough districts across the country. Put simply, the cost of not focusing on beating Donald Trump—of picking a candidate who cannot build a broad coalition—could be a disaster for our party and progressive values come November. It would be a disaster for the most vulnerable Americans—the ones who our party speaks up for. Americans with pre-existing conditions. Americans who depend on the social safety net. Americans who are disabled or retired. Our veterans. Our communities of color. The cost of another four years of Donald Trump is just too high for us to get this wrong. And it’s not hyperbolic to say that there are many Americans whose lives depend on it. There are lives abroad that depend on it, too. So, look, friend. Cory Booker talked about love. Andrew Yang talked about automation. Amy Klobuchar talked about the heartland. Mayor Pete talked about a new generation of leaders. Tom Steyer talked about climate change. Bernie and Warren talk about taking on corruption. Let’s take all those important issues and come together as a party in 2020 to get Donald Trump out of the White House. _Vice President Biden is the best candidate to do just that._ [**So today, on Super Tuesday, as a third of the country heads to the polls to make their voices heard in this election, we’re asking you to make a split donation between our campaign and Joe Biden’s campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678227/165681437/-1641786362?refcode=20200303_email_biden_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678228/165681438/-1641786362?refcode=20200303_email_biden_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=)
He’s surging, and Democrats are coming together behind him. But there’s still a long way to go, and this election is going to require all of us stepping up and working hard each day until November. Thank you, Team Moulton | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678229/165681439/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=&emci=78b4db5e-835d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=60d56334-885d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678230/165681440/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=&emci=78b4db5e-835d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=60d56334-885d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678231/165681441/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=&emci=78b4db5e-835d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=60d56334-885d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15678232/165681442/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1NjMzNC04ODVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykXMpfR8jtersBfndlpi7gNECirWxKlfbTiHRqSLW6g=&emci=78b4db5e-835d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=60d56334-885d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=194769)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Election day is here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is finally here! Polls are open from 7:00am to 7:00pm and you can find a convenient polling location by [clicking here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=f8acbb94304d4089b0bf7e9fc5d4d763&_e=ic4U_CzF8yRM3zj0zQmP2SVerajixxoxq_IuVvQDdcdaeOdQs-nWQSGUf7SixWOp7qkyuDXbiIdrt0P7QxYHpyeR29FCglfZFXfr371WoxiuGFON4vANJlLiJKKcNpzD6gXs_C_tU5-a_dnfmL3TcxZcbLJTWdiEMrFP_ysQbj7toDSb05yK6YVn92goVY7nOrd5R3O4kq3JjrnQKCLnatD8-wbiBIscfdEkO4E8RDiHMmBKem6H1nIcp19lT80lzs1XHU0b77dHV6bs3rO2CK7Wv-ef6Y17h-NQGzmJvv0%3D)

The past 11 months have been a whirlwind. I have been blown away by the generous supporters like you who have welcomed me into your homes, spent your weekends block-walking, and contributed your hard-earned money to our campaign. Our campaign has incredible grassroots energy because of supporters like you.

And today, Friend, I ask you for one last thing, your vote.

Lizzie Fletcher has failed to be the moderate she campaigned as in 2018. We need real representation back in the 7th District. We need someone who will defend our energy jobs, secure our southern border and pass meaningful flood prevention legislation. Lizzie Fletcher isn't that representative.

I fought to defend our country from enemies abroad and I'll fight to defend our values in Washington.

I hope I can count on your support.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

PS: After polls close at 7:00pm, join us as we watch the results come through from the Firehouse Saloon!

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=f8acbb94304d4089b0bf7e9fc5d4d763&_e=ic4U_CzF8yRM3zj0zQmP2WN2oduaPd_wFISey9M8N2D-7Kk-wqzWB73SsDhdQ3Yx9E6B2h6-FvxIfOUdsMl6kucBApT2P8wdPgItwp-awNUWuMD04pCjP57Z9yUPYvzC1k0OfsUKf3ljmwU4W8hWLj0ARSSuTzl_m3ld-Pv754mt6dfZo9rDKl_uQYyO4q3Ye4YxG0df2UZUscXLBHe1n3tRwX2yFreEPrl1EP4Vu2_zKbN01wr9TYQJ7rTTKNvvvIAFXrYeUflasgfcBNq4aFOQRgtAoYZG5Q4FkcsnHA0%3D)****

name: Ted Cruz
subject: You're the first to know (private)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, I wanted you to be among the first to know that on March 26th I will be coming to Fredericksburg, Virginia, to headline a fundraiser for my friend Nick Freitas as he fights to unseat liberal Abigail Spanberger and take back the 7th District. [**Will you join me in Fredericksburg to support Nick Freitas?**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=a6a0c45c08ee48168030841414fd12b5&_e=RjSpgXQ0-Vu-Y5xGWKfCH1SWrnTUmOWIxeWvO5FQu5zzYAIDjAb5UX-l05LWalJraplZA9G0zuujohp3S9gBQz2K11U9r8_Mf9-mL1Um8rjCfFLjCuMYfWcgYC7Mg4fSvq8CMlFGpG1tHIuyRRlCC20X3HBB1e083IqT-K5csWsEU3xDf7JzfODLeVAT4I3ob832NfDv6TGxdqcXggF70aQlLhsbffFg_lanWP5sITt84W3JM1tRVErEbkXwjE7Sc4RqXJ7kc0agCYZqbq6q5WTA-WDzBOphrxgje7bgOt4q-2UsHQzc0eIVsh7p6BA9stAUGQMeAbsGq4AK92eJC9ocecdhEGK5jS4dSK-raLlHH5mTABZkktaNgCqcUkzLsIWivPYoyqWzI63j2qs03DIt9zkJXIl0oz8d3ug-5P_7VH7I1g7sDi30UGUzCnSR) Friend \- the future of a conservative majority in the House of Representatives runs through Virginia’s 7th District and the Democrats know it. name: Bill Olson
subject: Stand up to gun-grabber Bloomberg!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

Hi Peter

“Gun grabbers” like Michael Bloomberg are demagogues. They don’t tell it to you straight, but I will!￼

Here is my "gun permit":

A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.

If you read the Second Amendment the way I do, it appears to me that the very reason there is a right to bear arms,is for security as both militia and as individuals.. James Madison didn’t include the Second Amendment in the Constitution so that Americans could go deer hunting!

It was placed in the Constitution because England became tyrannical and Americans had to have the ability to wage war (using single fire muskets, mind you) to secure our freedoms.

In addition to that, modern Americans, generally do not own weapons of war, nor do they own “assault rifles.” Civilian rifles that are purchased today are not weapons of war. I spent 27 years in the United States Army. I think I know what weapons of war are.

Automatic weapons have not been used in recent mass shootings. In the shootings in Orlando, New Town, Ct., and San Bernardino, semi-automatic weapons, one requiring you to pull the trigger each time to fire a cartridge, were the weapons used.

Most so-called experts on the left have no idea what they’re talking about. The next time someone talks about banning assault rifles, please explain to them that most assault rifles are already banned and not legal to be owned by 99% of the population.

The constant attempts to revoke our God-given rights to protect ourselves and our freedoms have gone on long enough. I can stop this! Can you help me win in Florida's 9th?

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

Can I count on you for a donation

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/Re_eWC-pteWsniz8_eStIiMV9VKLdKypPBDVSjCiTvI=)

Well, friend, I know there is a lot of focus today on the impact of Super Tuesday on the Presidential election, and there should be. But there are a lot of other races that matter for the future of Arkansas and for the future of this country, and this is an important day for those races too.

One of those races is for the Arkansas State Senate right here in District 32. And I first want to thank you for the opportunity to run in that race and to represent you at the State Capitol. As of today, we are officially on the general election ballot in November, and I can't tell you how excited I am about that and how much it means to me.

In addition to officially being the Democratic nominee, today also marks the official beginning of the general election, and we have a race on our hands that we must win for the people of this community and this state.

We want to start this election off right, and the best way to get off to a strong start is to have the resources we need to win. **[That's why I am asking you to donate today to kick off this race and launch us into the General Election.](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/Re_eWC-pteWsniz8_eStIiMV9VKLdKypPBDVSjCiTvI=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/Re_eWC-pteWsniz8_eStIiMV9VKLdKypPBDVSjCiTvI=)
_You can also make a contribution by mailing a check to: P.O. Box 7268, Little Rock, AR 72217. _

This campaign is all about Arkansas families -- uplifting your voice, working to improve the issues that matter most in your life, and making this the kind of state where everyone wants to live and work.

That means I need everyone to be a part of this campaign. [_**There are so many ways to be involved -- you can sign up to volunteer and stay informed here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/PCnxHDAsimDVtgF8X0gUkn3P0Vo2JlQJZv3oVdM4IgU=)

And again, in order to run the race we need to these next eight months, our campaign also needs to be able to execute our budget. [**So please, pitch in today**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/Re_eWC-pteWsniz8_eStIiMV9VKLdKypPBDVSjCiTvI=)

It is a true honor to be able to run to represent you in the Arkansas State Legislature. I will work every day to earn your vote and then to serve you.

Let's do this. And thank you.

Clarke

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
---
Clarke Tucker for State Senate
PO Box 7268
Little Rock AR 72217 United States
[Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/b7G3AJalE-SZpKBCdbE5ilmVZ2apaGApQNI0ipggLns=/OBRW6GhOzVtAOHPNuHTA-g-F-nhBWaXT8hT0u8cdicM=)

name: Jason Yates
subject: LIVE Prayer Call This Friday
body:
Peter,
It’s critical that we don’t just vote; we encourage you and every Christian in America to pray.
There is nothing more important and nothing more powerful to influence the elections for biblical values than by joining together in prayer.
**We invite you to join us for a special LIVE event called,_Vote Your Values_ , on March 6, 12:15 PM EST.**
We’re partnering with [_Intercessors for America_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=BOom2RdfI6ug6DAjcIV3nC78xe4Oy19KPiTxD4lWwhk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200303com01&n=1) to discuss how your prayers can shape the 2020 election and to give you the opportunity to join in agreement, through prayer, with other believers across the nation.
Join us this Friday, March 6, at 12:15pm EST by calling (712) 775-7430 (no code needed) or join us on [Facebook LIVE](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200303com01&n=2).
I look forward to having you on the call.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200303com01&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200303com01&n=4).

name: Jake C.
subject: Have you volunteered for Adem yet? Sign up today!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dc33iYBUQWr7tpDmExnd75nySg91AuydK5BtgUilhJY=/UidZrNguqdTnnc3aroqAUXzvy92WkikzCGiD3EIOKxU=)

Peter,

Hey there -- I'm Jake, Adem's field director. Last week, we began the process of collecting petition signatures, and I'm excited to share that we're already off to a great start!

As you probably know, Adem needs a certain amount of signatures to qualify for the June 23rd primary elections -- it's the only thing standing between us and appearing on the ballot to defeat Rep. Clarke.

That's why we're counting on supporters like you: If you weren't able to make it out for our petitioning kick-off last Saturday, **[we'll be hosting another volunteer event this weekend, and we'd love for you to join us!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dc33iYBUQWr7tpDmExnd75nySg91AuydK5BtgUilhJY=/qPkCbkjrVQfPfbTH3383pVqJSM2RiM0tu0zjLPfl63M=)**

WHEN: Saturday, March 7th, at 11:00 AM
WHERE: 767 Washington Ave., Brooklyn, NY 11238

**[To sign up, CLICK HERE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dc33iYBUQWr7tpDmExnd75nySg91AuydK5BtgUilhJY=/qPkCbkjrVQfPfbTH3383pVqJSM2RiM0tu0zjLPfl63M=)**

Hope to see you there!
Jake

P.S. Let's see if we can beat last week's turnout!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dc33iYBUQWr7tpDmExnd75nySg91AuydK5BtgUilhJY=/JqxSQ2mWE5wgbYZp5JkGyO5_mavh5J8fPOE8nLmwMd0=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dc33iYBUQWr7tpDmExnd75nySg91AuydK5BtgUilhJY=/JqxSQ2mWE5wgbYZp5JkGyO5_mavh5J8fPOE8nLmwMd0=)
