body:
Our last chance to mobilize voters is now. Will you show up for one last Primary push? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/todays-the-day-we-win?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2e061164d4&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [*FNAME*],

We've canvassed, organized, called and texted for months - and today is the day we've been working toward. Until 7pm today voters will be lining up to cast their ballots, and **there is so much at stake**.

A livable planet for our children and all other life on Earth. Healthcare and housing and dignified work. Safety for migrants, LGBTQIA+ folks, Black and Brown and Indigenous people. Economic freedom from landlords, bosses, bankruptcy.

No matter the outcome of this election, we must continue to organize - but **today we fight like hell to win**. We need every single person reading this to get out and vote!
---
| [See Wait Times at Polling Locations](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=b7fa2ae5cb&e=c169cb0a8e "See Wait Times at Polling Locations")
---
|
---
Today we have over a hundred poll canvassers greeting folks!
| We've run a truly incredible campaign, and so many supporters have stepped up for the home stretch. **But to win, we need everyone who can to show up for this campaign today**. There is work to be done right up until the polls close, so if you can come through for us one last time in this Primary, please do.
---
| [ SIGN UP TO PHONEBANK ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=6f646c247b&e=c169cb0a8e " SIGN UP TO PHONEBANK ")
---
| After the polls close, no matter what role you have played in this campaign, **we invite you to our Watch Party tonight** to be together as the results come in. We'll have food, drinks, music, dancing, and camaraderie as we celebrate the truly incredible achievements of this campaign.
**[Heidi For Congress Watch Party](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=c7417e4095&e=c169cb0a8e)**
Tonight (3/3) @ Sahara Lounge
1413 Webberville Rd
6:30pm - 11:30pm
**Kids welcome!**
**We are grateful for everything you've contributed to this movement**. We hope you will join us tonight, and tomorrow as we continue to organize, win or lose.

In solidarity,

Team Heidi

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Surgeon General: Be Cautious, But Not Afraid of Coronavirus
body:
To address the disease outbreak, we can rely on tried-and-true planning and preparation that was begun long ago.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc11313ea7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Surgeon General: Be Cautious, But Not Afraid of Coronavirus**

“Since being named to the coronavirus task force, I've quickly made a few observations. It is clear we must continue to help Americans understand how to protect themselves, but also that we mustn't recreate the wheel. To address the disease outbreak, we can rely on tried-and-true planning and preparation that was begun long ago,” Surgeon General Jerome Adams writes for CNN.

“We've been through this before and no place in the world is better prepared to handle this challenge. Let's turn fear into actions that will help us all stay safe.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6a1d6f5ff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| A public health issue like the Coronavirus should unite political leaders and the media behind helping Americans stay safe and informed. Unfortunately, “many members of our corporate press only see the public health crisis as another opportunity to attack the president.” Madeline Osburn sets the record straight in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ece162ff9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For the first time in more than a decade, Americans regard the U.S. rather than China as the world's leading economic power . . . Throughout the past decade, Americans consistently named China as the leading economic power, including by roughly 20-point margins between 2011 and 2014,” Jeffrey M. Jones reports for [_**Gallup**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6229a246cc&e=3ee4985eea "https://news.gallup.com/poll/287108/fewer-regard-china-favorably-leading-economy.aspx").
---
|
---
| “When the Taliban launched a series of attacks on the eve of [past peace] talks that killed dozens of Afghan citizens, Mr. Trump scrapped the whole deal and walked away. And then went right back to killing Taliban fighters. That is how you operate from a point of strength. Six months later, we are back at the bargaining table. The Taliban have demonstrated a reduction in violence,” Charles Hurt writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6de99123c2&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c64875227&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ad4d1625b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=df373705a4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Today's the day...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out today to do a few things:

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08de/1482109508/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Friend,

All our hard work has led up to this point. Today, San Diegans will decide who they want to represent them in Congress.

I wanted to reach out today to do a few things:
1. **Humbly ask for your vote.** I know this decision is one of the most important any citizen can make, and I would be honored to receive your support at the ballot box.

2. **Help you find your polling place** : [_**https://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/polling-place/. **_ ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08df/1482109508/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/polling-place/")Please use this link to find your polling place. Voting is easy and extremely important, and I hope you'll all make time to participate in today's election before polls close tonight at 8 p.m.

3. **Ask that you bring family, friends, or community members:** This movement is all about community, and the only way we can make change is by bringing people from all walks of life together.

Thank you all so much for your continued support!

Thanks,
Sara Jacobs

P.S. Help us with last-minute GOTV supplies. [_**Pitch in here >>**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08c0/1482109508/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200303-1-EM&amount=1")
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08c1/1482109508/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08c2/1482109508/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_
[](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08c3/1482109508/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-gif&recurring=true&amount=25")
| [DONATE TO SARA ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791f/27c6da69/2b3cf23a/12f08c1/1482109508/VEsB/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")

body:
|

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ce/7f51f7bc/4d909abf/4ef19db3/129878171/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryday?refcode=email_20200303.2nd__1002__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
It's Primary Day, and that means we're paying attention to lots of critical numbers -- not just the results but **ALSO** our Primary Day goal!

As of a few minutes ago, we're **a third of the way to our Primary Day goal of $20,000** \-- and **[we're counting on your help to push us the rest of the way there!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ce/7f51f7bc/4d909abf/4ef19db3/129878171/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryday?refcode=email_20200303.2nd__1002__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

The momentum we build today will determine how strong this campaign is as we face our next challenge. Remember, this primary is just the first step. We expect to face an expensive runoff where Mitch McConnell and Sen. Cornyn's special interest buddies will **dump money into Texas to boost MJ 's opponent.**

So we need to start fighting NOW. Getting MJ out there to share her story and her passion is going to be _crucial_. Senator Cornyn lets his corporate special interests speak for him -- but **MJ speaks for herself.**

**[With your help,](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902ce/7f51f7bc/4d909abf/4ef19db3/129878171/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryday?refcode=email_20200303.2nd__1002__&amount=10&recurring=true")** we'll have the resources we need to help MJ win the runoff and then defeat Sen. Cornyn.

**Let 's hit our goal together, enter the next phase with strong momentum, and take the fight to Sen. Cornyn. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Rita Hart
subject: A special announcement...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/m3r-UCtIuaJdLs7-zJXy7Z6mEWz_4xcVJjN-Gb-tIOw=/tcpMg7virTSwSwjzioi__cRkgh1byY0WRAHAKorXuXU=?refcode=200303-email) Peter, I'm pleased to announce that I'm officially on the ballot to be the representative of Iowa's 2nd congressional district. This is a big step for our campaign! **[Let's keep this momentum going. Now that I'm officially on the ballot, we need to prepare for a hard-fought and competitive race. Can we get 100 new donations to celebrate this accomplishment? Donate today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/m3r-UCtIuaJdLs7-zJXy7Z6mEWz_4xcVJjN-Gb-tIOw=/1_EouTaX2XkWSLRsCbtdz_1pcfSS3yrUVRqLkDySjsw=?refcode=200303-email)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/m3r-UCtIuaJdLs7-zJXy7Z6mEWz_4xcVJjN-Gb-tIOw=/1_EouTaX2XkWSLRsCbtdz_1pcfSS3yrUVRqLkDySjsw=?refcode=200303-email) Getting on the ballot is a big step for our campaign. Now, we have to build the infrastructure and support system to win in November so I can take your issues and voices to Washington. We can't forget that this is a district that Trump won in 2016, so we can't take anything for granted in this race. Despite the challenges we'll face ahead, I promise that I'll always listen to the voices of the people of Iowa's second district first. Your stories and your concerns will guide me to do what's best for our district and our families in Washington. I'm fighting alongside you for lower prescription drug prices and to protect Social Security and Medicare now, and I'll keep that charge in Washington. **[Donate today to help us keep building the network we need to win in November. This race is one of the most important to the future of our district and our country, so I'll need your help to win.](https://act.myngp.com/el/m3r-UCtIuaJdLs7-zJXy7Z6mEWz_4xcVJjN-Gb-tIOw=/1_EouTaX2XkWSLRsCbtdz_1pcfSS3yrUVRqLkDySjsw=?refcode=200303-email)** \- Rita Hart | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/m3r-UCtIuaJdLs7-zJXy7Z6mEWz_4xcVJjN-Gb-tIOw=/tcpMg7virTSwSwjzioi__cRkgh1byY0WRAHAKorXuXU=?refcode=200303-email)******

name: Deb and Jim Scholten =?utf-8?b?KEouRC7igJlz?= parents)
subject: Our son’s birthday is tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

We are so proud of our son, J.D., and his run for Congress. Every day on the trail he shows his Iowa values of love, respect, and kindness.

>From a young age, J.D. has been compassionate and competitive -- from watching him play baseball through college and beyond to watching him run for office, he takes every challenge seriously.

J.D. has so much love for Iowa. After leaving for some time, he came home after his Grandma Fern called on him to take care of the farm. Our son’s heart and soul is in Iowa, and we can’t wait to see him represent us in Congress.

**[While J.D. is on the road, we’re helping to put together a digital birthday card for this milestone birthday for him! Can you add your name and a birthday wish to the card?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15683063/165730503/481996775?ms=em20_200303_bday&refcode=em20_200303_bday&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzQwNGM4NS05YzVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NwFhQ-rfn_gkoxKi592A1VEeTdNb_pYO0_VMJ7SIWNo=&emci=8bf13af3-8b5d-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=bc404c85-9c5d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)**

subject: Super Tuesday 🎉
body:
Today is a big day for Democratic voters everywhere. Let's make it a big day for our campaign! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aaeaae338af1/super-tuesday?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
# It's finally here.
Super Tuesday is here! An exciting day for millions of Democrats throughout the country who will head to the polls to help decide our nominee for President. Here in Illinois...we have to wait a couple of weeks to see how our primary shakes out.

While we all anticipate the results tonight on a big day for our party, your donation to this campaign will mean a great deal to our success both in 2 weeks and in November.

**So, in between frantically checking twitter for exit polls, reminding your friends in Super Tuesday states to vote, and watching the results come in tonight, I'm asking you to take a couple of minutes to send in another contribution to our campaign. **

You can chip in [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c3b7d29cac&e=140a9b81e7) to help us finish the primary with as much momentum as possible.

Dani Brzozowski
Democrat for Congress, IL-16

| Peter,
We're in the final stretch! [We have just a couple of hours until polls close at 7pm.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BeMsX__hSVyUEVXoelZO_2Ij7fi8rv-zONQNQZrkGC98TILV_DWICsFf4MqfZzP7KiF4OZWYG4n34aKPX6gHppmPu5qwdDzv-KjgRc8sSTo6RPaEGB0df1O2TQBeX2O1s70ZSWYE3Y0dyC50hGrtxoxijh7XZ7jV&c=OLzp9HSWpHUHWVlCQbC6Jw_Ncog6lFJRhOOgithn4UkoV7j_ueoHKw==&ch=PIKCieERBQ-CFvwry9dMfQ4Rga3hhI8cAKhXLxiWXORXXNeF8PvRFg==)

name: Cory Booker
subject: A very important race you should know about.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| This one election could determine whether Democrats win back the Senate. Team, there's a very important election happening in Maine this year. In fact, this one race is so critical that it could end up determining which party controls the Senate next year. Sara Gideon is the leading Democratic candidate for this seat. A public servant who has served admirably as Maine's Speaker of the House, she is positioned to win in November and help us take back the Senate. _A recent poll of the state even had her in the lead in a general election matchup -- showing that this is a winnable race._ **Now is the time for us to give Sara our support and help her raise the resources she 'll need to win. Can you split a donation between our campaigns today to help Democrats regain control of the Senate?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-saragideon-split?refcode=em_fr_20200303_CB_20200303-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---

There's no doubt that Republicans in Washington, D.C. are going to expend a significant amount of resources to defend this seat. We're going to have to do our part to help Sara compete with the special interests and dark money groups that are sure to pour millions of dollars into this race.
**[Now that a poll is showing Sara in the lead, it's a great time to step up and help power her campaign to victory this fall. If you can, please split a donation so we can flip this seat.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-saragideon-split?refcode=em_fr_20200303_CB_20200303-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I know that I, as well as so many residents of the great state of Maine, would be proud to call Sara Senator Gideon next year. Thank you for helping to make that happen.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-saragideon-split?refcode=em_fr_20200303_CB_20200303-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Pierce Bush
subject: Today is the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
**This is it.** Today is Election Day. After months of meeting with Texans, countless miles driven around the district, and amazing words of encouragement from people like you, it’s time for us to vote. Your support for Team Bush has been incredible so far, but the most important thing is to make sure to get out and vote before polls close at 7pm.
I promise, as your Congressman, I will be a voice for you in the House. That’s why I am asking you to make your voices heard by casting your ballot.

If you haven’t voted yet, there’s still time before the day is over! Click below find your polling place: [ **POLLING LOCATIONS** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=66d1fe9a424241dcaeced125543c13e8&_m=fe82bbdf96284993821c1d5c1d4a246c&_e=dfpT01pEt6HpMgy9e_o6swLIvsgxJ8nZeEd8OpXEGIYXNJ06Y_4e6Qq5eh0qcDaxWBDKSc1dkk0ATjEzoYSbGzkQvadeXqM4IEHBKlN__bm8_Rt08l32KrHvoHgPIiErGahtx3V91v4upqn9lXLgJmGPx7JLDfGoD7bie7Z_ekhipogl7auXlnMSZ78WRUh2r6WJ7wRh0HTZWzYWH0JmiDxRcewju8qXgzghnigTToeROiKxaLjhs694aCS3H6PqgUqXcw7UrTKHb8bpHmR38W1AjMoBdEf_JxwP_q0lcNxPyMjWtalCkErXsw5tGHmMU5x4U5zTIsIWzrAVElwU9xE4vU04f6gPS90hT3UFAHQ%3D) I also wanted to invite you to an**election watch party** my team will be having at Bullpen Pizza and Bar, 14019 Southwest Fwy, Sugar Land, TX 77478. The event starts at 7pm and I hope to see you there! [You can find more information through the Facebook event page here.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=66d1fe9a424241dcaeced125543c13e8&_m=fe82bbdf96284993821c1d5c1d4a246c&_e=dfpT01pEt6HpMgy9e_o6s_UHUzM8JmdkJgrjew-0X6R0EiNbDUBHL8-kbV3Waokwz21zUOr8OWKFHVja3vcXIP01LVAYYCpB0JUvuX_LUB5RozRLYUWQ8L5qoxmKfrSUPW80ITiOmlQGbsBAcp3GhsIfEa4sKFHUkT9wz9hkG_x_6ey7RiZgKquyc4Eyo9WDyIpJ6uF8_lVrkJSVOeQpFxWVVCYRYe_xAs8DgJ7OhguOttZnJDmo7M_vHjhZCs9_bb6VAf6cSWycsu02GjQKaVIq-_6CERoI6KdDWCuYrVeCR4tHjb1P_Z18nfToE1fuWiQtW7yB0gIXi_AyrVeLmYi_uy9UOxWr9XSvKeFfsqzVsXDEopVnmCVRToJf1LOc) Thank you again for all of your support and I hope to see you tonight! -Pierce Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Pierce Bush for Congress [ UNSUBSCRIBE ](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66d1fe9a424241dcaeced125543c13e8&_s=fe82bbdf96284993821c1d5c1d4a246c&_t=FnqE2iTF-LXTuvt-_RgFJI4ydtmkkggn2wl0M_0Ybp8Nj0VPWinyQc7NDAKdDMjYy8Y4nfz2GUjsi_i3Vf_-iZ0iNsRNOfRmsTve77atwoVjt809gxgwPaC3IPO96vA_m0yxUJfB_I7uK21icKMbCAArymuxVnX_F2HaA0sYu2M%3D)

Friend, Did you see Chris's email from this morning? With election day finally upon us, we wanted to reach out to you one last time and urge you to vote! Your support has meant so much to Chris and we couldn't get this far in the race without you, friend. While we still have a few hours until polls close, I want you to have every opportunity to vote before it's too late! Please visit **visiting[votetexas.gov](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/no24zc7tebpLGZm7ltVjRA/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg) or contact us at [info@putnamfortexas.org](mailto:info@putnamfortexas.org)** if you need any help finding your polling location. [**We also would like to invite you to an exclusive victory party tonight at The Ridglea Room at 7:00 PM!**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/L3yqHL763rV763W5Y7rd03dd4A/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg) We will be celebrating all of our hard work this election and root Chris on as the polls return. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/L3yqHL763rV763W5Y7rd03dd4A/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg) Thank you for your support and I hope we see you tonight! \- Karin From: Chris Putnam To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: March 3, 2020 Subject: Today is the day! VOTE! Friend, Election day is FINALLY here! **After months of traveling across Texas ' 12th district, we are on the verge of a historic victory.** Kay Granger and her team of DC lobbyists have seen the same information that we have and are terrified you will help us win today. Let's not leave anything to chance today and finish with no regrets. Reach out to your friends and neighbors, and take them to the polls with you! If you need any help finding your polling location, **visit[votetexas.gov](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/no24zc7tebpLGZm7ltVjRA/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg) or contact my campaign team at [info@putnamfortexas.org.](mailto:info@putnamfortexas.org) ** **Today is the last day to beat Kay Granger, no IFs, ANDs, or BUTs. I know we can win together, but I need you to vote before polls close tonight at 7:00 PM.** After the polls close tonight, **[we are hosting an exclusive victory party for our most dedicated supporters](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/L3yqHL763rV763W5Y7rd03dd4A/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg)**. We hope to see you and your family there! [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/L3yqHL763rV763W5Y7rd03dd4A/ZjVvG4HHxFEhhNg892KuLaPg) Thank you for your support and your vote today, \- Chris

body:
Look, defeating Trump is our first job in 2020. But what’s just as important is walking into 2021 with a Democratic Senate majority.
#
Yesterday, Charles announced his full support for Bernie Sanders.
As we speak, Democrats from 14 states are voting for their presidential pick.
**Look, defeating Trump is our first job in 2020.** But what’s _just_ as important is walking into 2021 with a Democratic Senate majority.
**We can beat Mitch McConnell.** His approval rating is down to 33%. But if we want to win, we’re going to need help. That’s why we have to ask:
[**Can you rush a donation to Charles’ campaign tonight as you watch the results roll in? name: Gary Peters
subject: Senate control is at stake here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I need your help to fight back
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8bd/5721a3ed/7f4b8733/efb2cd1/3927510496/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
I'm reaching out because I need your help to fight back, friend: we're _still_ $15,000 short of Saturday night's end-of-month goal. It was the most important goal of our campaign.

And after Betsy DeVos' family sunk nearly $1 million into a super PAC to defeat me, recent polling is showing our race statistically TIED. Simply put, if we lose in Michigan, Democrats will have zero chance of taking back the Senate.
That's why, at this important moment for our campaign, I'm reaching out with some incredible news:

**After missing our end-of-month goal, a group of fired-up donors is stepping up to personally MATCH every donation**** to close our $15,000 budget shortfall, win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
**Friend, Senate control is at stake here in Michigan: **_[**Can I count on you to rush $3 now (becomes $6) to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk325-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")_
If we lose here, Mitch McConnell will control the Senate for another two years. In that time, who knows how many more extremist Supreme Court justices he could confirm or what he'll do to the Affordable Care Act.
That's why Democrats MUST win back a Senate majority - and it's possible. This election is our greatest chance yet, but only if we win here in Michigan. **So with a group of donors offering to match all donations, I'm asking you to step up too and make an impact that will go twice as far.**
**I wouldn't ask if it weren't critically important:[Will you make a contribution of $3 or more now and have every dollar of it DOUBLED to defend Michigan's Senate seat, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk325-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

That's why Democrats MUST win back a Senate majority - and it's possible. This election is our greatest chance yet, but only if we win here in Michigan. So with a group of donors offering to match all donations, I'm asking you to step up too and make an impact that will go twice as far. I wouldn't ask if it weren't critically important: "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Gary | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support "" This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address "" We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click "". If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click "" "" |

body:

Hi Peter,
We only have one hour left until the polls close.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15685567/165760646/581910462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWU3NmYzMC1hYjVkLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QOX5hfsNHrim9X8PRs1uRla8kQwN6dOdK_wAOeo3yo=&emci=1b31a884-de58-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=a1e76f30-ab5d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8311474)

Unfortunately, that’s not what’s happening in America right now. We’re seeing runaway capitalism continue to reward bad actors who exploit and overwork the 99% of Americans while stockpiling their wealth in tax havens overseas. **[Workers of all stripes, from cashiers to construction workers, from teachers to miners, need leaders who are willing to stand up for labor. If you’re ready for the rich to pay their fair share and workers to be compensated fairly, add your name here.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=c3fc7939e40940439bf259c9b1be84aa&_e=tnHDAxExGZe6USs38F8aqSun4V3ufVuULC58gj4nFL18bPK5djNLr2oYSdeQ3lAiyh46Y_sa_aSQ0K0tXIoCXJ7QwGr2b_RG5h_hYtyFlT2vBoKwUnNTNtxdwI1C70MKPaUliKez9PGQUl8sx27kMkaG3BtJpD3tiMqzuWgDFC7vEcxbAI7NBGqHgo2TETkmj_t03W_EpHcz60jS7K8DG0OvVsM9m6-9jx7whGfJWhvPUwI--wjyUmRhD_hreq7-ZnsL5gkB22z8RDNmd8OXucam516y1QJ3sxf9TY2-EHtdNsh94gopyfeU4_xaYVRN)** _Worker productivity has steadily gone up over the past few decades, however wages remain stagnant. That means we’re all working harder and longer but taking home less for our families._ Montana is home to some of the smartest, hardest working people we know, but they still struggle to make ends meet. If we truly want to keep the American Dream alive, we can’t let the wealthy steal it out from under us. A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Politicizing the Deaths of Americans
body:
The Coronavirus (COVID-19) is in America with 108 reported cases as of this hour. Six Americans have succumbed to the virus and we should expect a surge of those infected with the virus.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366556-859699-4894121-cda1003984-663bd090e6)
Patriot,

The Coronavirus (COVID-19) is in America with 108 reported cases as of this hour.

Six Americans have succumbed to the virus and we should expect a surge of those infected with the virus.

Florida’s governor, Ron DeSantis, has declared a public health emergency as there are now two positive cases of Coronavirus in Florida.

This is the somber reality of the world but, to our benefit, America’s free-market healthcare system is the best-equipped on Earth to deal with this threat.

**We all have to work together to control this outbreak.**

[The CDC has posted many helpful guidelines to prevent the spread of COVID-19.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366556-859699-4894119-0ccb41f502-663bd090e6)

Yes, they will seem simple, **but panicking will cause far more problems than a virus ever could**.

If your loved ones become sick, care for them while maintaining the CDC’s recommendations. If you become sick there’s an entirely different set of recommendations to follow. [See here.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366556-859699-4894120-c8cd7832e6-663bd090e6)

While we have our political differences, Americans all have one thing in common: we’re fighters and as resilient as they come.

What is not helpful is politicians using a serious health issue for political gain.

* Just hours ago Nancy Pelosi bashed President Trump for rightfully continuing his work to dismantle Obamacare.

* Chuck Schumer spread fake news that President Trump called the Coronavirus “a hoax.” He did not.

* Ilhan Omar piled on by attempting to tie the Coronavirus to President Trump’s long known cost-saving measures for Medicare and Medicaid, retweeting “As the coronavirus crisis threatens our health and safety, Trump is proposing massive cuts to our health care.”

* Even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez got into the mix, calling it “utterly irresponsible” to put Vice President Pence in charge of the U.S. response to the Coronavirus. AOC, who worked as a bartender before her election to Congress, then went on to tout her expertise on the issue stating, “I hold awards . . . for accomplishments in microbiology.”

* My opponent, Lois Frankel, used the Coronavirus to urge people to stay home while saying “but many Americans lack paid sick leave . . . we need the Healthy Families Act now!”

I cannot make this stuff up.

As Rahm Emanuel, Barack Obama’s old chief of staff used to say, “Never let a serious crisis go to waste.”

And the Democrats never disappoint.

**This is yet another reason why Republicans MUST take back the house. We need serious leaders who put people over politics.**

We need leaders who use their time in office to do good and assist the Trump Administration in moving our nation forward, not backwards.

Thank you again for all that you do, and please do reach out if you need any assistance from me. I’ll do all that I can.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. While our resources are tight for the campaign, if there’s anything that we can do to assist you as the Coronavirus spreads, please do let us know by replying to this email. We’re maintaining a list of links for information regarding COVID-19 along with a rolling list of N95 mask suppliers in the event that you or a family member becomes ill (they are not recommended until then). Thanks again and please do your part to keep your community healthy in the coming weeks.

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-366556-859699-84585d41bbe610b-663bd090e6)

---

body:
---
| | [**TRUMP: I am going to take New Mexico from Democrats**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200303_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") [**_This is the most important ask I 've ever made of you. After swooping into my home state and holding a massive rally, Trump just pledged to turn our state red. I need a historic response -- 3,459 gifts in the next 24 hours -- to make his pledge backfire. Every single gift will be emergency-matched. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200303_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I'm asking you to make a critical choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Trump come into our house, turn this state red, and sabotage our chance to flip the Senate.

[**\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic Democratic response, and show Trump that he will NEVER take this state from us.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200303_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

Let me be clear: New Mexico is absolutely crucial to winning a Democratic Senate.

I will fight until my last breath to defend it from Trump's snatches.

I'm counting on Democrats nationwide to have our back tonight. Will you rush $10? [**This is so critical, your generous gift will be matched for the next 24 hours.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200303_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") | | ****[**MATCH your $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200303_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****

Thank you so much for fighting,

Ben Ray

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222163/3973000246/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222160/3973000246/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222161/3973000246/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222166/3973000246/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222167/3973000246/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b679/18e32a7f/4e6a9eca/7b222164/3973000246/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Looking back...
body:
Good afternoon Peter,
As our community heads to the polls today, I want to look back on the highlights of this great campaign.

>From the start, we have had the most dedicated, passionate supporters. I have been proud to build this campaign around the concept of community, and hearing from our neighbors. Thanks to my hardworking team, this was made possible.
http://marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927

http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927

>From parades to cookouts--

--from civic club meetings to meet and greets,

I am proud of the team we put together. Your hard work allowed me to focus on meeting voters, sharing our message, and committing our efforts to service and advocacy, not just raising money. For that, for making this such a worthwhile experience, I thank you.
I am grateful and proud to have you all on my team!

If you haven't voted yet, please be sure to make it to your local polling station before 7 P.M. today!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=dc1735e8a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_03_03_05_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-dc1735e8a8-32267927)

Thank you for everything,

Marc

| | Friend, No matter who you support, there is no denying that the enthusiasm in this primary shows that momentum is on our side. Today Minnesotans from all walks of life stood up and made their voices heard - a trend I hope to see continue into this fall. Elections are won at the grassroots, we will organize and build so that we not only have a democratic president this fall, but protect the House DFL Majority and flip the Minnesota Senate. We can do it, but it takes all of us. Thank you for your support. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘You will always have an open door at the White House’
body:
The Coronavirus response is just the latest reminder: It’s often local officials who are the first line of defense when it comes to... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1e911d468&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 3, 2020
---
| | |
# **‘You will always have an open door at the White House’**

**The Coronavirus response** is just the latest reminder: It’s often local officials who are the first line of defense when it comes to protecting our communities.

**Today, President Trump** addressed many of these local leaders at the National Association of Counties Legislative Conference. “In our great national renewal, my Administration has made engagement with local leaders a top priority, because nobody understands the needs of local communities” better than the people in this room, he said.

**🎬****President Trump:**[We’re securing billions to help local leaders fight Coronavirus](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a89c2f3493&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Every day,** we are working with you to build a country where every town is booming,” the President added. “You will always have an open door at the White House. No matter what community you represent.”

**President Trump:**[How community leaders can help America stay prepared ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d29c3687ce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Update: Low risk, but Administration stays vigilant against Coronavirus**

**Vice President Mike Pence** and members of the White House Coronavirus Task Force held a briefing yesterday evening to update Americans on the Coronavirus response.

**While experts** say the risk remains low, the Trump Administration is making readiness preparations an [“all-hands-on-deck effort,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a63ea7ec8&e=3ee4985eea) the Vice President said.

**Local leaders** are getting the full support of the federal government to help fight the spread of the virus. Vice President Pence is in close contact with our nation’s governors, making sure each one has all the resources necessary on the ground.

**Americans also deserve** regular updates while the fight against Coronavirus continues. “We’ll be back here every day,” Vice President Pence said, referring to daily briefings from the White House task force. “Get used to seeing us.”

**Earlier yesterday,** President Trump met with representatives from top pharmaceutical companies at the White House. He asked how the federal government could be most helpful in accelerating the development of a COVID-19 vaccine.

**“We’re working very hard** to expedite the longer process of developing a vaccine. We’re also moving with maximum speed to develop therapies so that we can help people recover as quickly as possible,” the President said.

**“Since the start of the outbreak,** my Administration has taken the most aggressive action in history to protect our citizens . . . We will confront this challenge together, and we will continue to do exactly what we’re doing.”

[MORE: Surgeon General says to be cautious, but not afraid](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6bb15ae2e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Press Secretary:** [President just donated his salary to aid Coronavirus response](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8559a2c8dd&e=3ee4985eea)

Today, President Trump addressed many of these local leaders at the National Association of Counties Legislative Conference. “In our great national renewal, my Administration has made engagement with local leaders a top priority, because nobody understands the needs of local communities” better than the people in this room, he said. 🎬President Trump: “Every day, we are working with you to build a country where every town is booming,” the President added. “You will always have an open door at the White House. No matter what community you represent.” President Trump: | | Update: Low risk, but Administration stays vigilant against Coronavirus Vice President Mike Pence and members of the White House Coronavirus Task Force held a briefing yesterday evening to update Americans on the Coronavirus response. While experts say the risk remains low, the Trump Administration is making readiness preparations an the Vice President said. Local leaders are getting the full support of the federal government to help fight the spread of the virus. Vice President Pence is in close contact with our nation’s governors, making sure each one has all the resources necessary on the ground. Americans also deserve regular updates while the fight against Coronavirus continues. “We’ll be back here every day,” Vice President Pence said, referring to daily briefings from the White House task force. “Get used to seeing us.” Earlier yesterday, President Trump met with representatives from top pharmaceutical companies at the White House. He asked how the federal government could be most helpful in accelerating the development of a COVID-19 vaccine. “We’re working very hard to expedite the longer process of developing a vaccine. We’re also moving with maximum speed to develop therapies so that we can help people recover as quickly as possible,” the President said. “Since the start of the outbreak, my Administration has taken the most aggressive action in history to protect our citizens . . . We will confront this challenge together, and we will continue to do exactly what we’re doing.” Press Secretary: | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump delivers remarks at the National Association of Counties Legislative Conference | March 3, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Frequently, my campaign asks a lot of you at the end of the month, but true to form, you and a raft of other supporters always come through. The sense is that Iowa needs a change of leadership, and ev
|
---
| |
---

| | Thank you, team: Frequently, my campaign asks a lot of you at the end of the month, but true to form, you and a raft of other supporters always come through. The sense is that Iowa needs a change of leadership, and every donation gets us closer to beating Joni Ernst. Our campaign isn't cozying up to dark money groups or corporate PACs so support from people like you -- in all 99 counties of Iowa and from every U.S. state -- is what it will take to win. We have an opportunity in November to take back this seat from a Republican who is riven by special interest. Yes, by hitting our end-of-month goal -- thanks to you -- Sen Joni Ernst is one step closer to a November defeat. This was our first monthly fundraising drive since I officially filed to run -- handing in almost five times as many signatures as is needed to get on the ballot -- so, it was crucial that we hit this mark. **I 'm honored by your support, and humbled by your enthusiasm.** Thank you, very much, -MTF (Admiral Mike) | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f8/33365068/4a6b6eb0/3f8be628/3419709187/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200303_thankyou_em_ty_all_ftr")

name: Mike Turner
subject: Stand with me and tell Pelosi that the Buckeye State can’t be bought.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Stand with me and tell Pelosi that the Buckeye State can’t be bought.

Nancy Pelosi’s intentions to buy seats in our state -- including mine -- is an outright scam. Our state can’t be bought!

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

Don’t let Nancy Pelosi’s political games trick you -- she is using the dark money of liberal special interest groups to buy the 2020 Election in Ohio.

Nancy Pelosi’s intentions to buy seats in our state -- including mine -- is an outright scam. Our state can’t be bought!

Ohioans value honest, hard work. Just as we are against socialist policies that provide free money and handouts, we won’t accept our being voice drowned out by Pelosi’s special interest dollars.

If you agree that Pelosi’s actions and attempts to buy Ohio are unacceptable, then add your name to our petition today! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Stand with me and tell Pelosi that Ohio is NOT for sale!>>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

The liberal special interest groups supporting Pelosi are wildly out of touch with the Buckeye State. These groups want nothing more than enacting radical policies like the Green New Deal and Medicare for All that would be crippling to our communities.

Unlike Pelosi, I have worked hard to fight for this district in Congress. And unlike Pelosi, I have fought for local jobs, families, and our communities. Through my efforts -- and NOT Pelosi’s, we were able to add more than 10,000 jobs at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, the largest single-site employer in our state!

Stand with me today to protect our state from Nancy Pelosi and her liberal special interest groups! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Sign your name HERE to tell Pelosi that Ohio is NOT for sale!>>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you,

Mike Turner

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER

120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE5MjM5MTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcyMDIzOTcxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0
